description: Multiple eval() calls, should cap at MAX_FINDINGS_PER_RULE=3
code:
def process_all(items):
    a = eval(items[0])
    b = eval(items[1])
    c = eval(items[2])
    d = eval(items[3])
    e = eval(items[4])
    return [a, b, c, d, e]
